title: Contact MMO
body: "Before contacting us you should check to see if we’ve already published information to answer your query. We often get enquiries about the following topics:   Understand your fishing vessel licence Create a UK catch certificate Do I need a marine licence? Marine Licensing: Travel and subsistence cost Bass Fishing Guidance 2025 How to arrange a burial at sea in the UK marine area Marine Protected Areas (MPAs)   Regional offices  We answer the call queues Monday to Thursday 0900 – 1630 and Fridays 0900 – 1600.   You can write to, email or call your local Marine Management Organisation (MMO) office. If you are unable to locate your local office, you can find it by using your postcode here. Bluefin Tuna - commercial: bft.commercial@marinemanagement.org.uk  Bluefin Tuna - recreational: bft.recreational@marinemanagement.org.uk  Fisheries Management Plans (MMO): fmp@marinemanagement.org.uk  Fisheries Management Plans (Defra): FMPs@defra.gov.uk  Marine & fisheries funds: mff.queries@marinemanagement.org.uk    Catch Recording Helpline  Telephone: 0300 0203 788  The line is staffed from 0800 until 1800, Monday to Friday. Outside of these times, the contact centre operates an automated service to allow fishers to leave catch records over the phone.  Fish export helpline  Telephone: 0330 159 1989  The helpline is available between 0800 and 1800, Monday to Friday (excluding bank holidays). Outside of these hours, the helpline service will assist on urgent technical issues, such as unexpected FES system outages or unavailability.  Fishing vessel licensing  For domestic fishing vessel licensing queries:  fishingvessellicensing@marinemanagement.org.uk   North (North Shields, Whitehaven, Preston): DomesticFVLNorth@marinemanagement.org.uk  East (Scarborough, Lowestoft, Beverley, Harwich): DomesticFVLEast@marinemanagement.org.uk  South East (Hastings, Shoreham): DomesticFVLSouthEast@marinemanagement.org.uk  South (Poole, Brixham, Portsmouth): DomesticFVLSouth@marinemanagement.org.uk  South West (Plymouth): DomesticFVLSouthWest@marinemanagement.org.uk  West (Newlyn):...
